description: Web UI Foundation - FastAPI dashboard with SSE live logs, full API for kernel state/control, and single-page HTML dashboard with Tailwind CDN
steps: Create web/ directory at project root with __init__.py

Create web/app.py with FastAPI app containing: GET / (dashboard), GET /api/state, GET /api/tasks, GET /api/history (evolution history from kernel/evolution/history.jsonl), GET /api/reflections (from memory/reflections.jsonl), GET /api/skills (from skills/_index.yaml), POST /api/goal (set goal), POST /api/start (run kernel in background thread), POST /api/stop (stop execution), GET /api/logs (SSE stream)

Create web/templates/dashboard.html - single HTML file with Tailwind CDN, containing: goal input + start button, progress bar, current node indicator, live SSE log stream, task list, evolution history timeline, skill inventory display
Add WebSocket endpoint ws://localhost:8000/ws that broadcasts state changes in real-time
Add uvicorn startup in web/app.py so running 'python -m web.app' starts the server
Add fastapi, uvicorn, websockets, httpx to pyproject.toml dependencies
Create tests/test_web.py with comprehensive tests using FastAPI TestClient covering all API endpoints, SSE streaming, WebSocket connections, error cases (missing state files, invalid goal input)
acceptance_criteria: python -m web.app starts without errors (tested via import and app creation)
All API endpoints return correct JSON responses when tested via TestClient
WebSocket connection can be established and receives messages
Dashboard HTML loads and contains all required UI elements
All existing 894 tests still pass plus new web tests pass
findings: SSE streaming tests cannot use TestClient.stream() with iter_lines due to infinite generator blocking. Used route existence and configuration checks instead. All 925 tests pass (894 existing + 31 new), coverage 98.35%. The start endpoint background thread finishes quickly in test mode so stop timing is non-deterministic.
